texto: When i remember your namei know you are my hope.for what ?not for love...'cause i know you can't love me.but i know you are my hope for... Life.Just remembering your smile...i know you are my worldyou shaping my world that became like this...you are my storyNot to be told, But to remember...i love youand... I miss you nowi miss my worldi miss your face, your smile and your voiceI miss you more than anyone that I've ever met-For Enno Indi WP-
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Yulianto Eko P: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “When i remember your namei know you are my hope.for what ?not for love...'cause i know you can't …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, longing, poem pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de poem e poetry.
